polymarket.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Will Mojtaba Khamenei be head of state in Iran end of 2026?
Israel x Iran ceasefire continues through July 25?
Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $95 in July?
Will LeBron James play for the Golden State Warriors in 2026-27?
Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?
Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $100 in July?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed: followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on data. The data includes Fed rates: no change 76% (vol $1.38M), increase 25bps 24% (vol $0.538M). So expectation is no change (bullish for rates stable). Iran head of state: Mojtaba Khamenei 74% (vol $0.267M) suggests expectation of continuity. Israel-Iran ceasefire continues through July 25: 71% (vol $0.252M) suggests optimism about ceasefire. WTI crude hitting $95 in July: 61% (vol $0.241M) moderate bullish on oil price. Hitting $100: 33% lower. LeBron James to Warriors: 16% low expectation. US invade Iran before 2027: 29% low.

Overall sentiment: Mixed? There's bullish on stable rates, ceasefire, oil price moderate up, but low chance of invasion, low chance of LeBron move. Could be cautiously optimistic about geopolitical stability and monetary policy, but uncertainty on oil higher price and geopolitical risk. I'd say Mixed: stable
